title: Will Trump Accounts deliver for American children?
summary: The White House is promoting Trump Accounts as a way to give new generations a stake in the American dream, positioning it as a major economic initiative. However, the scheme faces criticism from skeptics questioning its viability and impact. The debate centers on whether this investment vehicle can effectively help younger Americans build wealth.
content: The White House has hailed the project as giving new generations a stake in the American dream, but the scheme has its critics.

zh.title: 特朗普账户能为美国儿童提供帮助吗？
zh.summary: 白宫正在推广特朗普账户，将其作为给新一代提供美国梦一份的方式，并将其定位为重大经济举措。然而，该计划面临持怀疑态度批评者的质疑，他们对其可行性和影响提出了质问。辩论的核心是这种投资工具是否能够有效帮助美国年轻人积累财富。

title: 'We've saved 34 tonnes of food and a carpet'
summary: Two community groups report record attendance at their programs, which have diverted 34 tonnes of food and various items from waste. These initiatives demonstrate growing community interest in sustainability and resource sharing. The items given away highlight how community programs can reduce waste while meeting local needs.
content: Two community groups say they have welcomed "record attendances" and given away many 'random items".

zh.title: '我们节省了34吨食物和一条地毯'
zh.summary: 两个社区团体报告其计划创下创纪录的参与人数，这些计划从废物流中转移了34吨食物和各种物品。这些举措表明了社区对可持续性和资源共享的日益浓厚兴趣。所捐赠的物品突出了社区计划在减少浪费的同时满足当地需求的方式。

title: AstraZeneca's trial flop raises a bigger question: Is its pipeline premium becoming more vulnerable?
summary: AstraZeneca has experienced a trial failure that raises questions about the durability of its premium valuation in the European pharmaceutical sector. The company's high valuation has historically been justified by a track record of delivering successful drug development results. This setback suggests investors may need to reassess their confidence in AstraZeneca's pipeline and future profitability.
content: For years, AstraZeneca has commanded one of the richest valuations among large European pharma companies on the assumption that it consistently delivers results.

zh.title: 阿斯利康的试验失败提出了一个更大的问题：其管道溢价变得更加脆弱吗？
zh.summary: 阿斯利康经历了一次试验失败，这引发了对其在欧洲制药部门的溢价估值耐久性的质疑。该公司的高估值在历史上一直由成功的药物开发成果来支撑。这一挫折表明投资者可能需要重新评估对阿斯利康管道和未来盈利能力的信心。

title: Apple sues OpenAI alleging trade secret theft, says scheme was 'at every level'
summary: Apple has filed a lawsuit against OpenAI, alleging the company stole trade secrets through a scheme operating "at every level." The lawsuit follows Apple and OpenAI's 2024 partnership integrating ChatGPT into iPhone's operating system.
content: The two companies entered into a high-profile partnership in 2024 when ChatGPT was integrated into the iPhone's operating system.

zh.title: 苹果起诉OpenAI窃取商业机密，称计划"无处不在"
zh.summary: 苹果已对OpenAI提起诉讼，指控该公司通过一项"无处不在"的计划窃取商业机密。此诉讼源于苹果和OpenAI的2024年合作，将ChatGPT整合到iPhone的操作系统中。
